releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Vim Commands for Obsidian.

## Highlights

- Map Obsidian commands to Vim-style multi-key sequences and leader mappings.
- Use mappings across the app, including tabs, sidebars, and the Markdown editor.
- Configure mappings in a vault-local, vimrc-style file.
- Run core Obsidian commands and commands provided by community plugins.
- Avoid intercepting text fields and Vim insert mode.
